title: Pan-Seared Fish with Portuguese Flaky Crust
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the crispy texture of Portuguese flaky crust with the delicate taste of pan-seared fish.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and black pepper.
Dip each fish fillet into the Portuguese flaky crust mix, coating both sides evenly.
Heat olive oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated fish fillets to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the fish hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
Repeat with the remaining fish fillets.
